Command.Name: organize
Command.Description: Scan and organize 3D printing files in the current directory

Option.Description: Additional extensions to include for GCode files, separated by space. Extensions are case-insensitive.
Additional extensions to include for Project files, separated by space. Extensions are case-insensitive.
Additional extensions to include for Source files, separated by space. Extensions are case-insensitive.
Optional target directory to organize. Defaults to the current working directory.
